title: nigellastrum ciliare
intro: Nigellastrum ciliare, also known as desert heliotrope or wild turnip, is a plant species native to Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Nigellastrum ciliare include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Nigellastrum ciliare are typically made from its roots and leaves, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and capsules.
